Thanks for contributing to The Corn. Pick the section that applies and fill it in.
Delete the other section before submitting.
-->

## Article PRs

Source material check (mirrors the STYLE_GUIDE sniff test):

- [ ] Source post described in plain text in this PR description (**NOT** a screenshot attached to this PR)
- [ ] All names anonymized per STYLE_GUIDE — no real names, no real initials
- [ ] No specific independent businesses named
- [ ] No real street addresses or named landmarks
- [ ] Sensitive topics avoided (children, real crimes, mental health, race-coded panic)
- [ ] Composite of 2+ source posts rather than single-source
- [ ] Disclaimer renders correctly on the article page (checked via preview deploy)
- [ ] Catt (editor of record) has reviewed before merge

### Source description (plain text)

<!-- Briefly describe the source post(s) in your own words. Do NOT paste screenshots. -->

### Notes / editorial decisions

<!-- Anything reviewers should know — composite choices, names invented, tone calls, etc. -->

---

## Non-article PRs

- [ ] Tests/build pass locally
